name: compliance closed-loop step manifest-to-audit-log records the manifest hash into the audit log
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance compliance && printf '{"commit":"abc","controls_consulted":["GV.OC"]}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-test.sh" --step manifest-to-audit-log --provenance .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json --audit-log compliance/audit.log --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"event":"provenance-manifest-emitted"' compliance/audit.log && grep -q '"commit":"abc"' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
